creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Good day, Greg!

Since you taked this pr: http://bugs.freebsd.org/160846, i want to 
clarify some of my further plans on it.

1. There is patch for this port, that updates it to 3.8.0:
    http://bugs.freebsd.org/160988 but please note that there is
    correlated port that should be update too:
    http://bugs.freebsd.org/160987
2. Current maintainer doesn't objects to passing
    maintainership to me, please see followup to ports/160988.
3. After ports/160988 will be committed, patch attached (Makefile.diff)
    should be applied to make this repocopied port actually work.
4. After that zope.interface-deps_change.diff should be applied, that
    fix all the dependend ports.
5. After that devel/py-zopeInterface may be removed.
6. User should be suggested to make
    portmaster -o devel/py-zope.interface devel/py-zopeInterface in
    UPDATING.

Thank you.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
